Package com.wip.dto

Class ShipmentDto

java.lang.Object
com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
public class ShipmentDto extends Object
Data Transfer Object for transferring shipment details between the API layer and the service layer.

This DTO represents a shipment record created for a dispatched parcel. It is used in both API responses (to display tracking and delivery information) and in update requests (to modify the current location and estimated delivery date). The trackingNumber and shipmentDate are generated by the server and are included only in response payloads. The customerName and receiverPhone fields are denormalized from the associated parcel and customer for display convenience.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • getShipmentId

      public Long getShipmentId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this shipment.
      Returns:
      the shipment ID, or null if not yet persisted

    • setShipmentId

      public void setShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Sets the unique identifier of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the shipment ID to assign

    • getParcelId

      public Long getParcelId()
      Returns the ID of the parcel associated with this shipment.
      Returns:
      the parcel ID

    • setParcelId

      public void setParcelId(Long parcelId)
      Sets the ID of the parcel associated with this shipment.
      Parameters:
      parcelId - the parcel ID to assign

    • getTrackingNumber

      public String getTrackingNumber()
      Returns the unique tracking number assigned to this shipment.
      Returns:
      the tracking number string

    • setTrackingNumber

      public void setTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
      Sets the unique tracking number for this shipment.
      Parameters:
      trackingNumber - the tracking number to assign

    • getShipmentDate

      public LocalDate getShipmentDate()
      Returns the dispatch date of this shipment.
      Returns:
      the shipment date as a LocalDate

    • setShipmentDate

      public void setShipmentDate(LocalDate shipmentDate)
      Sets the dispatch date of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentDate - the dispatch date to assign

    • getCurrentLocation

      public String getCurrentLocation()
      Returns the current geographic location of this shipment.
      Returns:
      the current location string

    • setCurrentLocation

      public void setCurrentLocation(String currentLocation)
      Sets the current geographic location of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      currentLocation - the current location to assign; must not be blank

    • getEstimatedDeliveryDate

      public LocalDate getEstimatedDeliveryDate()
      Returns the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
      Returns:
      the estimated delivery date as a LocalDate

    • setEstimatedDeliveryDate

      public void setEstimatedDeliveryDate(LocalDate estimatedDeliveryDate)
      Sets the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
      Parameters:
      estimatedDeliveryDate - the estimated delivery date to assign; must not be null

    • getCustomerName

      public String getCustomerName()
      Returns the name of the customer who owns the associated parcel.
      Returns:
      the customer's full name, or null if not populated

    • setCustomerName

      public void setCustomerName(String customerName)
      Sets the name of the customer who owns the associated parcel.
      Parameters:
      customerName - the customer name to assign

    • getReceiverPhone

      public String getReceiverPhone()
      Returns the receiver's phone number from the associated parcel.
      Returns:
      the receiver's phone number, or null if not populated

    • setReceiverPhone

      public void setReceiverPhone(String receiverPhone)
      Sets the receiver's phone number from the associated parcel.
      Parameters:
      receiverPhone - the receiver phone number to assign
